parameters.content:
## LDX hub All Services Demo

### How it works

This workflow is an interactive demo hub for multiple LDX Hub services. A form submission captures the target service and host details, routes the user into the selected service lane, gathers available models or engines, collects the required file and output settings, runs the LDX Hub operation, and presents either a download form or an error form.

### Setup steps

- Create one **LDXhub API** credential in n8n. Set both its Base URL and API Key fields to expressions referencing the form (e.g. ={{ $('On form submission').item.json.host }} and ={{ $('On form submission').item.json.api_key }}), then select it in each LDXhub node.
- No static API key is stored: the key is entered in the form per execution and consumed only for that run.
- The model/engine HTTP Request nodes call LDX hub's public metadata endpoints and need no authentication, so the dropdowns work during workflow design.
- Get a free API key (25,000 credits/month, no credit card) at https://gw.portal.ldxhub.io

### Customization

Customize the service branches by changing model or engine endpoints, filtering available output formats in the Set nodes, or adding/removing form fields for service-specific options such as OCR language or conversion targets.

## Start service routing

Receives the demo form submission and switches execution into the selected LDX Hub service branch.

## StructFlow
Fetch models → collect task (system prompt + example output) + JSONL file → run. Success/error outputs branch on the right.

## RefineLoop
Fetch models → upload XLIFF + optional params (revisions, domain, output mode…) → run. Success/error outputs branch on the right.

## RenderOCR
Pick engine → upload file → filter outputs by file type → choose format + language → run. Success/error outputs branch on the right.

## CastDoc
Pick engine → upload PDF → filter outputs → choose format → run (no OCR, high-fidelity). Success/error outputs branch on the right.

## ExtractDoc
Pick engine → upload doc → filter outputs by file type → choose text or JSONL → run. Success/error outputs branch on the right.

parameters.formTitle: Try LDX hub — 5 services in one workflow
parameters.formDescription:
Pick from StructFlow, RefineLoop, RenderOCR, CastDoc, or ExtractDoc — and run a one-off job with your API key. The key is consumed only for this execution and is not stored in n8n credentials.

🎁 Free tier: 25,000 credits/month, no credit card required.
Get your API key at: https://gw.portal.ldxhub.io

options.formDescription: Pick an extraction engine. The supported input formats and output formats depend on the selected engine.

assignments.name: to_options
assignments.value: ={{ $('ExtractDoc: Get Engines').item.json.data.find(e => e.id === $json.engine).supported_conversions.map(c => c.to).filter((v, i, a) => a.indexOf(v) === i) }}

assignments.name: from_options
assignments.value: ={{ $('ExtractDoc: Get Engines').item.json.data.find(e => e.id === $json.engine).supported_conversions.map(c => c.from).filter((v, i, a) => a.indexOf(v) === i) }}

options.formDescription: Upload your document. The available output formats will be filtered based on the file type in the next step.

assignments.name: to_options
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const map = { jpg: 'jpeg', tif: 'tiff' }; const raw = ($binary.file.fileExtension || '').toLowerCase(); const from = map[raw] || raw; return $('ExtractDoc: Get Engines').item.json.data.find(e => e.id === $('ExtractDoc: Select Engine').item.json.engine).supported_conversions.filter(c => c.from === from).map(c => c.to).filter((v, i, a) => a.indexOf(v) === i); })() }}

options.formDescription: Choose the output format. Options are filtered based on the file you just uploaded.

parameters.responseText:
=

Something went wrong

Your ExtractDoc job could not be completed.

This usually happens when:

  • Your API key is invalid or expired
  • You've exceeded your monthly credit limit
  • The file is corrupted or unsupported

Please verify your API key at gw.portal.ldxhub.io and try again.

Error details: {{ typeof $json.error === 'string' ? $json.error : ($json.error?.message || $json.message || 'No additional details available.') }}

parameters.completionMessage:
Your converted file has been downloaded.

Want to convert another file or try a different service?
Reload this page to start over.

assignments.name: to_options
assignments.value: ={{ $('RenderOCR: Get Engines').item.json.data.find(e => e.id === $json.engine).supported_conversions.map(c => c.to).filter((v, i, a) => a.indexOf(v) === i) }}

assignments.name: from_options
assignments.value: ={{ $('RenderOCR: Get Engines').item.json.data.find(e => e.id === $json.engine).supported_conversions.map(c => c.from).filter((v, i, a) => a.indexOf(v) === i) }}

assignments.name: language_options
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const codes = $('RenderOCR: Get Engines').item.json.data.find(e => e.id === $json.engine).supported_languages.map(l => l.code); return codes.includes('Auto') ? ['Auto', ...codes.filter(c => c !== 'Auto')] : codes; })() }}

options.formDescription: Pick an OCR engine. The supported input formats, output formats, and languages depend on the selected engine.
Upload your document. The available output formats will be filtered based on the file type in the next step.

assignments.name: to_options
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const map = { jpg: 'jpeg', tif: 'tiff' }; const raw = ($binary.file.fileExtension || '').toLowerCase(); const from = map[raw] || raw; return $('RenderOCR: Get Engines').item.json.data.find(e => e.id === $('RenderOCR: Select Engine').item.json.engine).supported_conversions.filter(c => c.from === from).map(c => c.to).filter((v, i, a) => a.indexOf(v) === i); })() }}

options.formDescription: Choose the output format and language. Output formats depend on the file you uploaded; languages depend on the engine.

parameters.completionMessage:
